case_title: TERRANCE PERRY VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF TERRANCE PERRY IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY BRIAN CAULEY, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
